subject: Road to new office
body:
Dear Jeffrey,
Finally I can send you this plan, I was unnable to open it before. As you can see is based on the existing road, the parking terrace is not defined yet, but I do not see any problems ?there.I just spoke with Doug, who shares with me the oversize of the main rooms in the Pool Compound, I suppose I will meet with him after he returns from vacation. J.P.
(those little semicircles on the road are for the Palms.)






??

body_html:
Dear Jeffrey,
Finally I can send you this plan, I was unnable to open it before. As you can see is based on the existing road, the parking terrace is not defined yet, but I do not see any problems  there.I just spoke with Doug, who shares with me the oversize of the main rooms in the Pool Compound, I suppose I will meet with him after he returns from vacation. J.P.
(those little semicircles on the road are for the Palms.)
